reviews.comment:
Si no te levanta el café de ahí....no sabes lo que es el buen café, ya sea lágrima cortado o simplemente café. La YPF de ahí tiene el mejor café de avellaneda. extraño a la sra de ojos claros muy amorosa que atendia

(Translated by Google)
If the coffee there doesn't lift your spirits... you don't know what good coffee is, whether it's a cortado or just plain coffee. The YPF station there has the best coffee in Avellaneda. I miss the lovely, light-eyed lady who used to serve there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLdFpudWRBEAE
